pulseNotes: 2026-06-22 04:07 MDT: Fresh direct HTML recheck of the Gumroad root, bundle, and public post confirmed the live state is unchanged. The root still titles `Levi Kritzik | Ferris Automations`, the bundle page still carries the stronger local-business discovery copy, and the public post still truncates its description at `reactivati`, so the public post remains the weakest discovery surface. Next Gumroad move stays seller-side post source inspection only; do not burn another pulse on profile-root churn.

2026-06-22 04:00 MDT: Re-ran the live Gmail-backed fulfillment writer and the Gumroad public-metadata checker. Fulfillment still stayed flat at 3 commerce signals with 0 rows appended, and the weakest live Gumroad surface is still the public post with the same 150-character clipped description ending at `reactivati`. Because the cheap storefront checks stayed flat again, this heartbeat converted the blocked time into durable throughput instead: formalized `ferris-bridge-brief-hygiene` as a real Hermes skill and locked in the rule that bridge work must stay bounded/lane-specific while dashboard truth-sync and metadata checks stay direct and local.

2026-06-22 03:54 MDT: Fetched the Gumroad public profile post HTML directly and confirmed the title is still `Faster customer replies for local businesses - Levi Kritzik | Ferris Automations`, but the description still truncates at `reactivati`. The public profile root remains healthy, so the next reversible Gumroad move is seller-side post source inspection only; do not spend another heartbeat on public-root churn.
